title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hubtown - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hubtown - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Hubtown in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hubtown:
Hubtown is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hubtown!
